g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do Instagram DMs get ingested into the system?')
sendPrompt('How does website chat get integrated?')
sendPrompt('What does the Express API gateway do in this system?')
sendPrompt('How does the LangChain classification chain work?')
sendPrompt('How does ChromaDB help with query categorization?')
sendPrompt('What does the auto-reply engine do?')
sendPrompt('What data gets stored in MongoDB for the dashboard?')
sendPrompt('What aggregations run on MongoDB for trend analysis?')
sendPrompt('What charts should be on the Beastlife customer support dashboard?')
sendPrompt('How should the trend graph work on the dashboard?')
sendPrompt('What does the live query feed look like?')
sendPrompt('When should the system escalate to human support?')

svg.text: Scalability: horizontal API scaling + ChromaDB vector index growth + MongoDB sharding as query volume grows
